reflection:
yesterday's 2am wake-up was the part that worried you most, and you sat with it. three wakes, 130 minutes pacing around with marcus aurelius and warm water. that's a real night, and your cbt note showed it: intensity 7 dropped to 5 by the time you got the words down. that's the work, not the outcome.

then you got up and actually did the day. blood tests done, bioresonance done, and the verdict you got (histamine high, lymph blockage near the pelvis, vagus irritated) is a clean three-part target for once. you started ruporut, kept dinner inside the window at 19:00, and fibre landed at 31g which is well above your usual 15 to 25g. that could explain a chunk of the overnight heat and gas you flagged this morning, separate from the ruporut question.

what stands out is how the day after looks. pain 3. anxiety 1. one awakening, fifteen minutes. you wrote yourself that the therapy seems to be working and you feel calmer and more composed. that's not noise, that's the signal you've been waiting for.

your own idea was daosin before lunch. just that one. run it as a clean test today, no other new variables in. if overheating shows up again tonight without a high-fibre meal, that points at ruporut. if it doesn't, it was the fibre. you'll know more in 24 hours.
opener: rough night before, but yesterday you did the work and today shows it
focus_for_today: daosin before lunch, nothing else new. clean single-variable test.
